THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, WENJUN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEKELE, BETELHEM YITAGESU $5,081.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,281.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF WENJUN ZHANG IS PRESENT. WITNESS ZOE DRAZEN TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. BETELHEM YITAGESU BEKELE IS PRESENT. WITNESS WILLIAM DIRK, INSURANCE ADJUSTER TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. THE COURT VIEWS PICTURES ON PLAINTIFF'S CELL PHONE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
